name: Zhytomyr Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the central field — the Polissian sky and Teteriv river
the bordure and details — wheat, the Drevlianian heritage

description: A blue field within a wide yellow bordure, charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Zhytomyr Oblast.
history: Officially adopted on 31 October 2002 by a resolution of the eighth session of the Zhytomyr Oblast Council of the 24th convocation. Zhytomyr Oblast covers the historic Drevlianian and Polissian lands.
